description_long: This is a weathered stone obelisk with a tall, tapering shaft that rises from a roughly rectangular base. The surface is mottled with patches of moss and discoloration, indicating significant age and exposure to the elements. The front face features partially legible inscriptions, some of which appear to be engraved in capital letters, though erosion has rendered parts of the text faint. The obelisk's base is broad and solid, blending into a patch of earth and grass, suggesting it is set outdoors, possibly in a park or historical site. The tip of the obelisk is pointed but slightly rounded, lacking any decorative finial or embellishment. The overall appearance is utilitarian and commemorative, with minimal ornamentation beyond the inscriptions.
description: A tall, weathered stone obelisk with faint inscriptions on its front face, set on a broad, rough base surrounded by grass and earth.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main face with partially legible inscriptions and some blue markings, as well as the broad base merging into grassy ground.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the tapering shaft and the rough, unadorned stone surface, with less visible inscription and more pronounced weathering.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the most eroded and moss-covered surface, with no visible inscriptions and a clear view of the stone's texture.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a plain, tapering stone surface with minimal markings and a continuation of the grassy base.
attribute_inscription: Partially legible engraved text on the front face, in uppercase Latin letters, with some blue paint or markings; style is simple and utilitarian, with moderate erosion affecting legibility.
attribute_base_design: The base is a rough, rectangular stone block, slightly wider than the shaft, with no decorative features; it sits directly on a patch of earth and grass.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is pointed but slightly rounded, with no unique features or decorations.
attribute_surrounding_features: Patch of grass and earth immediately surrounding the base.
